description: Style Note Want to steal the show? Want to break off from the mundane? Want to set a trend? Want to stand out from the crowd? Now here's your chance to make a slick style statement with this maxima Aqua watch - this is the time-piece you've been waiting for to pep-up your accessory collection! Product Details Case style: Black round plastic caseDial style: White dial with black indicies and black handsStrap stype: Black synthetic strap with tang claspWater resistant to 3ATM, suitable for light rain or splashesWarranty: 1 Year Size: Case diameter: 24.5 mm Case thickness: 3 mm
